meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance builds. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship high-quality SaaS apps faster than ever before.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle ends when you stop reinventing the wheel. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a pre-configured architecture that handles auth, database, and UI scaffolding instantly. Combined with Claude Code's autonomous execution, you can bypass manual boilerplate and focus purely on high-value client features.
content.intro:
The graveyard of unfinished projects is paved with good intentions and broken momentum. You start with a vision, but three days in, you’re drowning in dependency hell and architectural indecision. The spark dies, the client gets impatient, and you’re back to square one.

But what if you didn't have to start from scratch? The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it's a structural exoskeleton designed for speed. When paired with Claude Code, you don't just write code—you orchestrate a production-ready application in hours, not weeks.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure and environment variables to ensure your project is production-ready from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Schema and Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your client's requirements to the database schema, ensuring type safety across the entire stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a SaaS task manager with user profiles, project entities, and subscription tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'generate prisma schema and push to database'

steps.title: Automate Authentication Middleware
steps.description: Secure your routes instantly by deploying the pre-configured auth middleware provided by the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the authentication middleware to protect all routes under /dashboard and redirect unauthorized users to /login.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'configure auth middleware for protected routes'

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Generation
steps.description: Use the template's component library to build out the dashboard and landing page views without manual styling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout using the Antigravity component library, including a sidebar and data table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'generate dashboard layout using existing components'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Finalize the build process and push to your hosting provider using the template's optimized build pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Finalize build settings and generate a deployment-ready production bundle optimized for Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: npm run build && claude --run 'verify build stability'

pro_tips: Always run your schema migrations through Claude Code to catch circular dependencies before they hit your database.
Use Antigravity's 'ghost mode' to generate mock data, allowing you to test UI states without needing a live backend.
Keep your Claude Code context window clean by summarizing completed features in a local 'DEV_LOG.md' file.
Leverage the template's built-in error boundaries to instantly provide professional fallback UI for your clients.
Map your custom domain early in the Antigravity config to ensure SEO metadata is correctly injected from day one.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, document your custom configuration as a personal 'Golden Template' to reuse across all future client projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects languish in your local directory. Gain the leverage of a senior architect and the speed of a machine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
